creative_brief: Split screen: left side shows a blurred, generic supermarket aisle with a large question mark overlay. Right side shows a clear photo of a named NSW farm with produce and a visible farm name tag. Clean, honest aesthetic. No text overlay needed beyond the brand logo.
primary_text:
We can't tell you what's in most supermarket food. 

Neither can they. That's not a scandal. It's just how long supply chains work. Traceability gets lost between the farm gate and the shelf. FarmThru exists because we thought you deserved better than a shrug. 

Every product traces back to a named NSW farm or supplier. No middlemen, no wholesalers. Just a short chain you can actually follow.
headline: We asked where your food's been
description: Farm-direct groceries from named NSW farms. Traceable from paddock to pick-up.
